title: boehmeria macrophylla var. zeylanica
intro: Boehmeria macrophylla var. zeylanica, also known as Ceylon nettle or zeylanica nettle, is a type of plant that belongs to the Urticaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Boehmeria macrophylla var. zeylanica include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Indian and Sri Lankan medicine to treat various health conditions.
